message:
Document local development patch.crates-io workflow in Cargo.toml and update validated manifest

- Cargo.toml: Add commented [patch.crates-io] section with paths for all
  sibling crate dependencies (asupersync, rich_rust, charmed-*, sqlmodel-*).
  Includes instructions for enabling/disabling via git update-index
  --skip-worktree to prevent accidental commits of local path overrides.
- VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json: Update manifest trailing whitespace normalization.

This documents the development workflow for contributors who want to test
against local crate checkouts without modifying CI-verified crates.io
dependency resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
